ddl.where: "deletedAt" IS NULL AND "taxId" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: uq_legal_entities_tax_id

ddl.where: "deletedAt" IS NULL AND "effectiveTo" IS NULL AND "isPrimary" = true
ddl.name: uq_position_assignments_primary

ddl.where: "deletedAt" IS NULL AND "regionId" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: uq_holiday_calendars_region_year

ddl.where: "deletedAt" IS NULL AND "status" = 'ACTIVE' AND "effectiveTo" IS NULL
ddl.name: uq_compensation_packages_active

ddl.where: "deletedAt" IS NULL AND "status" = 'ACTIVE' AND "effectiveTo" IS NULL AND "statutorySchemeId" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: uq_social_insurance_profiles_active_scheme

ddl.where: "deletedAt" IS NULL AND "status" = 'ACTIVE' AND "effectiveTo" IS NULL AND "statutorySchemeId" IS NULL
ddl.name: uq_social_insurance_profiles_active_legacy_name

ddl.where: "deletedAt" IS NULL AND "status" = 'ACTIVE' AND "effectiveTo" IS NULL
ddl.name: uq_benefit_enrollments_active

ddl.where: "deletedAt" IS NULL AND "status" = 'ACTIVE' AND "effectiveTo" IS NULL
ddl.name: uq_dependent_coverages_active

ddl.where: "deletedAt" IS NULL AND "verifiedBy" IS NOT NULL AND "verificationDate" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: idx_employee_certifications_verified_reporting

ddl.where: "finalScore" IS NOT NULL AND "deletedAt" IS NULL
ddl.name: idx_performance_review_goals_final

ddl.where: "deletedAt" IS NULL AND "certificateNumber" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: uq_certification_awards_certificate

ddl.value: "operation" NOT IN ('INSERT', 'UPDATE', 'DELETE', 'TRUNCATE') OR "tableName" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: chk_audit_data_ops_have_table

ddl.value: "archiveDestination" = 'NONE' OR "archiveDestination" IS NULL OR "archivePath" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: chk_archive_path_required

ddl.value: "expiryDate" IS NULL OR "issueDate" IS NULL OR "expiryDate" >= "issueDate"
ddl.name: chk_national_identifiers_dates

ddl.value: "minSalary" IS NULL OR "maxSalary" IS NULL OR "minSalary" <= "maxSalary"
ddl.name: chk_positions_salary_range

ddl.value: ("minSalary" IS NULL OR "minSalary" >= 0) AND ("maxSalary" IS NULL OR "maxSalary" >= 0)
ddl.name: chk_positions_salary_positive

ddl.value: "minSalary" IS NULL OR "maxSalary" IS NULL OR "minSalary" <= "maxSalary"
ddl.name: chk_job_grades_salary_range

ddl.value:
"midSalary" IS NULL OR (
        ("minSalary" IS NULL OR "midSalary" >= "minSalary") AND
        ("maxSalary" IS NULL OR "midSalary" <= "maxSalary")
      )
ddl.name: chk_job_grades_mid_salary

ddl.value:
("minSalary" IS NULL OR "minSalary" >= 0) AND
          ("midSalary" IS NULL OR "midSalary" >= 0) AND
          ("maxSalary" IS NULL OR "maxSalary" >= 0)
ddl.name: chk_job_grades_salary_positive

ddl.value:
"fromDepartmentId" IS DISTINCT FROM "toDepartmentId" OR
          "fromLocationId" IS DISTINCT FROM "toLocationId" OR
          "fromPositionId" IS DISTINCT FROM "toPositionId"
ddl.name: chk_employee_transfers_has_change

ddl.value: "hostDepartmentId" IS NOT NULL OR "hostLocationId" IS NOT NULL OR "hostLegalEntityId" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: chk_secondments_has_host

ddl.value: "checkOutAt" IS NULL OR "checkInAt" IS NULL OR "checkOutAt" > "checkInAt"
ddl.name: chk_attendance_checkout_after_checkin

ddl.value: "status" != 'APPROVED' OR ("approvedBy" IS NOT NULL AND "approvedAt" IS NOT NULL)
ddl.name: chk_leave_requests_approval_fields

ddl.value: NOT ("earningsTypeId" IS NOT NULL AND "deductionTypeId" IS NOT NULL)
ddl.name: chk_pay_components_single_master

ddl.value: "minSalary" IS NULL OR "maxSalary" IS NULL OR "minSalary" <= "maxSalary"
ddl.name: chk_pay_grade_structures_salary_range

ddl.value:
"midSalary" IS NULL OR (
        ("minSalary" IS NULL OR "midSalary" >= "minSalary") AND
        ("maxSalary" IS NULL OR "midSalary" <= "maxSalary")
      )
ddl.name: chk_pay_grade_structures_mid_salary

ddl.value:
("minSalary" IS NULL OR "minSalary" >= 0) AND
          ("midSalary" IS NULL OR "midSalary" >= 0) AND
          ("maxSalary" IS NULL OR "maxSalary" >= 0)
ddl.name: chk_pay_grade_structures_salary_positive

ddl.value: ("statutorySchemeId" IS NOT NULL) OR ("schemeName" IS NOT NULL AND length(trim("schemeName")) > 0)
ddl.name: chk_social_insurance_profiles_scheme_or_name

ddl.value: "expiryDate" IS NULL OR "issuedDate" IS NULL OR "expiryDate" >= "issuedDate"
ddl.name: chk_employee_certifications_dates

ddl.value:
(("verifiedBy" IS NULL) = ("verificationDate" IS NULL)) AND
          ("status"::text != 'PENDING_VERIFICATION' OR ("verifiedBy" IS NULL AND "verificationDate" IS NULL))
ddl.name: chk_employee_certifications_verification_consistency

ddl.value:
("selfRating" IS NULL OR ("selfRating" >= 1 AND "selfRating" <= 5)) AND
          ("managerRating" IS NULL OR ("managerRating" >= 1 AND "managerRating" <= 5)) AND
          ("finalRating" IS NULL OR ("finalRating" >= 1 AND "finalRating" <= 5))
ddl.name: chk_performance_reviews_ratings

ddl.value:
("finalRating" IS NULL OR "status"::text IN ('COMPLETED', 'ACKNOWLEDGED')) AND
          ("overallScore" IS NULL OR "status"::text IN ('COMPLETED', 'ACKNOWLEDGED'))
ddl.name: chk_performance_reviews_terminal_outcomes_vs_status

ddl.value:
("managerScore" IS NULL OR ("managerScore" >= 0 AND "managerScore" <= 5)) AND
          ("employeeScore" IS NULL OR ("employeeScore" >= 0 AND "employeeScore" <= 5)) AND
          ("finalScore" IS NULL OR ("finalScore" >= 0 AND "finalScore" <= 5))
ddl.name: chk_performance_review_goals_scores

ddl.value:
"managerScore" IS NULL OR "employeeScore" IS NULL OR "finalScore" IS NULL OR
          ("finalScore" >= LEAST("managerScore", "employeeScore") AND "finalScore" <= GREATEST("managerScore", "employeeScore"))
ddl.name: chk_performance_review_goals_final_between

ddl.value:
(("approvedBy" IS NULL) = ("approvedAt" IS NULL)) AND
          ("status"::text NOT IN ('APPROVED', 'COMPLETED') OR ("approvedBy" IS NOT NULL AND "approvedAt" IS NOT NULL))
ddl.name: chk_promotion_records_approval_consistency

ddl.value: "status"::text NOT IN ('ACTIVE', 'UNDER_REVIEW') OR "targetDate" IS NOT NULL
ddl.name: chk_succession_plans_target_when_live

ddl.value:
(("resolvedBy" IS NULL) = ("resolvedDate" IS NULL)) AND
          ("status"::text != 'RESOLVED' OR ("resolvedBy" IS NOT NULL AND "resolvedDate" IS NOT NULL)) AND
          (("resolvedBy" IS NULL AND "resolvedDate" IS NULL) OR "status"::text = 'RESOLVED')
ddl.name: chk_grievance_records_resolution_consistency

ddl.value:
("completionDate" IS NULL OR "status"::text = 'COMPLETED') AND
          ("status"::text != 'COMPLETED' OR "completionDate" IS NOT NULL)
ddl.name: chk_training_enrollments_completion_consistency

ddl.value: "status"::text <> 'HIRED' OR ("personId" IS NOT NULL AND "convertedEmployeeId" IS NOT NULL)
ddl.name: chk_candidates_hired_requires_hr_bridge

ddl.value: "minSalary" IS NULL OR "maxSalary" IS NULL OR "minSalary" <= "maxSalary"
ddl.name: chk_job_requisitions_salary_range

ddl.value:
("performanceRating" IS NULL OR ("performanceRating" >= 1 AND "performanceRating" <= 5)) AND
          ("attendanceRating" IS NULL OR ("attendanceRating" >= 1 AND "attendanceRating" <= 5)) AND
          ("attitudeRating" IS NULL OR ("attitudeRating" >= 1 AND "attitudeRating" <= 5)) AND
          ("overallRating" IS NULL OR ("overallRating" >= 1 AND "overallRating" <= 5))
ddl.name: chk_probation_evaluations_ratings

ddl.definition:
SELECT
      "audit"."audit_trail"."tenantId" AS tenant_id,
      "audit"."audit_trail"."actorId" AS actor_id,
      "audit"."audit_trail"."actorType" AS actor_type,
      date_trunc('day', "audit"."audit_trail"."occurredAt") AS summary_date,
      count(*)::bigint AS total_actions,
      count(*) FILTER (WHERE "audit"."audit_trail"."operation" = 'INSERT')::bigint AS insert_count,
      count(*) FILTER (WHERE "audit"."audit_trail"."operation" = 'UPDATE')::bigint AS update_count,
      count(*) FILTER (WHERE "audit"."audit_trail"."operation" = 'DELETE')::bigint AS delete_count,
      count(*) FILTER (WHERE "audit"."audit_trail"."operation" = 'LOGIN')::bigint AS login_count,
      count(*) FILTER (WHERE "audit"."audit_trail"."operation" = 'LOGOUT')::bigint AS logout_count,
      count(DISTINCT "audit"."audit_trail"."tableName")::bigint AS tables_accessed,
      count(DISTINCT "audit"."audit_trail"."sessionId")::bigint AS unique_sessions,
      count(DISTINCT "audit"."audit_trail"."sourceIp")::bigint AS unique_ips,
      min("audit"."audit_trail"."occurredAt") AS first_activity,
      max("audit"."audit_trail"."occurredAt") AS last_activity
    FROM "audit"."audit_trail"
    GROUP BY
      "audit"."audit_trail"."tenantId",
      "audit"."audit_trail"."actorId",
      "audit"."audit_trail"."actorType",
      date_trunc('day', "audit"."audit_trail"."occurredAt")
ddl.name: mv_actor_activity

ddl.definition:
SELECT
      "audit"."audit_trail"."tenantId" AS tenant_id,
      "audit"."audit_trail"."schemaName" AS schema_name,
      "audit"."audit_trail"."tableName" AS table_name,
      "audit"."audit_trail"."operation" AS operation,
      "audit"."audit_trail"."actorType" AS actor_type,
      date_trunc('day', "audit"."audit_trail"."occurredAt") AS summary_date,
      count(*)::bigint AS event_count,
      count(DISTINCT "audit"."audit_trail"."actorId")::bigint AS unique_actors,
      count(DISTINCT "audit"."audit_trail"."rowKey")::bigint AS unique_rows,
      min("audit"."audit_trail"."occurredAt") AS first_occurred_at,
      max("audit"."audit_trail"."occurredAt") AS last_occurred_at
    FROM "audit"."audit_trail"
    GROUP BY
      "audit"."audit_trail"."tenantId",
      "audit"."audit_trail"."schemaName",
      "audit"."audit_trail"."tableName",
      "audit"."audit_trail"."operation",
      "audit"."audit_trail"."actorType",
      date_trunc('day', "audit"."audit_trail"."occurredAt")
ddl.name: mv_audit_summary

ddl.definition:
SELECT
      "audit"."audit_trail"."tenantId" AS tenant_id,
      date_trunc('month', "audit"."audit_trail"."occurredAt") AS summary_month,
      count(*)::bigint AS total_events,
      count(*) FILTER (WHERE "audit"."audit_trail"."operation" IN ('INSERT', 'UPDATE', 'DELETE', 'TRUNCATE'))::bigint AS data_operations,
      count(*) FILTER (WHERE "audit"."audit_trail"."operation" IN ('LOGIN', 'LOGOUT', 'ACCESS', 'EXPORT'))::bigint AS access_operations,
      count(*) FILTER (WHERE "audit"."audit_trail"."operation" IN ('GRANT', 'REVOKE', 'CONFIG_CHANGE'))::bigint AS admin_operations,
      count(DISTINCT "audit"."audit_trail"."actorId") FILTER (WHERE "audit"."audit_trail"."actorType" = 'USER')::bigint AS active_users,
      count(DISTINCT "audit"."audit_trail"."actorId") FILTER (WHERE "audit"."audit_trail"."actorType" = 'SERVICE_PRINCIPAL')::bigint AS active_service_principals,
      count(*) FILTER (WHERE "audit"."audit_trail"."actorType" = 'SYSTEM')::bigint AS system_events,
      count(DISTINCT "audit"."audit_trail"."tableName")::bigint AS tables_audited,
      count(DISTINCT "audit"."audit_trail"."schemaName")::bigint AS schemas_audited
    FROM "audit"."audit_trail"
    GROUP BY
      "audit"."audit_trail"."tenantId",
      date_trunc('month', "audit"."audit_trail"."occurredAt")
ddl.name: mv_tenant_audit_overview
